O.text: Did the event occur during a scheduled operation or exercise?
O.yes: The event occurred during a scheduled operation or exercise.
O.no: The event occurred outside of a scheduled operation or exercise.

O.text: Were all required personnel present at their designated posts?
O.yes: All required personnel were present at their designated posts.
O.no: Not all required personnel were present at their designated posts.

O.text: Did equipment and systems perform as expected?
O.yes: Equipment and systems performed as expected.
O.no: Equipment or systems did not perform as expected.

O.text: Was there a deviation from standard operating procedure (SOP)?
O.yes: A deviation from standard operating procedure (SOP) was observed.
O.no: No deviation from standard operating procedure was observed.

D.text: Did a training gap contribute to the outcome?
D.yes: A training gap was identified as a contributing factor.
D.no: A training gap was not identified as a contributing factor.

D.text: Did equipment or maintenance issues contribute to the outcome?
D.yes: Equipment or maintenance issues contributed to the outcome.
D.no: Equipment and maintenance were not identified as contributing factors.

D.text: Did a communication breakdown contribute to the outcome?
D.yes: A breakdown in communication contributed to the outcome.
D.no: Communication was not identified as a contributing factor.

D.text: Has this type of issue occurred before?
D.yes: This is a recurring issue that has been observed previously.
D.no: This does not appear to be a recurring issue.

C.text: Did the mission or task ultimately meet its objective?
C.yes: The mission or task ultimately met its stated objective.
C.no: The mission or task did not fully meet its stated objective.

C.text: Is the current SOP adequate to prevent recurrence?
C.yes: The current SOP is assessed as adequate to prevent recurrence.
C.no: The current SOP is assessed as inadequate to prevent recurrence.

C.text: Does this issue pose a risk to future operations if left unaddressed?
C.yes: This issue poses a risk to future operations if left unaddressed.
C.no: This issue is not assessed as a significant risk to future operations.
Immediate corrective action is not required at this time.

R.text: Should this be escalated to command for review?
R.yes: Recommend escalating this report to command for review.
R.no: Escalation to command is not recommended at this time.
Additional training is not recommended at this time.
An SOP revision is not recommended at this time.

R.text: Should this report be distributed as a lessons-learned item to other units?
R.yes: Recommend distributing this report as a lessons-learned item to other units.
R.no: Distribution to other units is not recommended at this time.
